boom: Boom is a game framework built on top of Defold
bzAnim: A Lua/Defold-based animation library for bezier curve animations
defcon: Defold console helpers for in-game debugging and developer overlays.
defmath: Extra math helpers for Defold: lerps, clamps, easing, and 2D angle utilities.
defold-bridge: One SDK for cross-platform publishing HTML5 games
defold-input: Cross-platform input handling for Defold: keyboard, mouse, gamepad, touch, and on-screen controls.
defold-lang: Localization helpers for Defold: string tables, pluralization, and locale fallback.
defold-log: Logger with Performance Metrics for Defold
defold-metrics: Calculate and display performance metrics in Defold games
defold-orthographic: Orthographic camera functionality for the Defold game engine
defold-proto: Protocol-buffer style message encoding for compact Defold network payloads.
defold-richtext: Rich-text rendering for Defold: styled spans, embedded tags, and per-color text runs.
defold-saver: Persistent save helpers for Defold: typed tables, versioned slots, and atomic writes.
defold-yagames: YaGames is the Yandex.Games SDK implementation for the Defold game engine.
defsave: Save and load config and user data persistently between a Defold project's sessions
dicebag: Dicebag is a Defold extension containing probability functions designed specifically for games.
library-defold-persist: Defold Persist provides a simple interface for saving and loading data in a Defold game engine project.
library-defold-rendy: Defold Rendy provides a versatile camera suite and render pipeline in a Defold game engine project.
monarch: Screen manager for Defold with stacked, modal, and transition-aware navigation flows.
narrator: The Ink language parser and runtime implementation in Lua
squid: Squid is a standalone injectable system for saveable logging of user logs, errors and crashes for Defold.
starly: Scene orchestration for Defold: data-driven game states, transitions, and lifecycle hooks.
